description_long: This house features a striking geometric design with sharp, angular lines and a bold, high-contrast black and white exterior. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a modern, layered appearance. Large windows are set into the facade, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections featuring subtle elevation changes and overhangs. A prominent entryway is visible, accessed by a set of steps and partially sheltered by an overhanging roof. The property includes a paved area and what appears to be a pool or water feature on one side, enhancing its contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern, angular house with a black and white geometric facade, flat roof, large windows, and a prominent entryway with steps. The design includes layered volumes and a side pool or water feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, large windows, and the layered geometric facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, solid wall sections, and the overhanging roof above the entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, the layered structure, and the pool or water feature on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the pool area, flat roof, and the interplay of black and white surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, overhanging flat roof, and large glass door
